data.name: The Velan Reach - Book One: An Unbroken Line
data.detailed_description:
Introduction

The Velan Reach is an adult Visual Novel set in a unique steampunk sci-fi setting, in which you play the role of a humble scientist who, together with his lovely assistant, is invited to join a noblewoman's expedition into the unknown and rediscover the long-lost location of the cradle of humanity. But you soon find yourself pulled into a web of intrigue as you get to know the other members of your expedition, each of whom have their own reasons for being there and motivations for interacting with you.  

Visiting strange and exotic new places, you will meet a host of people (including aliens and robots) as you deal with the events that unfold during your journey. Along the way, you will get to know them better, learn about their reasons to be there, become quite intimate with some of them if you so desire, and face challenges that may force all of you to rethink your original goals and ambitions.

  • Discover strange new worlds and exotic locations.

  • Get to know each character, and build a relationship with them. Fall in love, give in to lust, or keep your distance.

  • Multiple love interests, and no need to commit to a single path.

  • Unique steampunk sci-fi setting. Step into a space-faring Victorian society.

  • Detailed character screen where you can learn more about each character's background and personality.

  • A gallery to review the special and intimate moments you shared with them.

  • Plenty of achievements to discover.

  • New content released episodically (see development for more info).

Game play

The Velan Reach Book One is an adult Visual Novel with an emphasis on character driven story telling and slow-burn romantic development with the main love interest(s) of your choice, while offering ample opportunities for some fun adult diversions along the way if you so chose.

There will be multiple love interests that can be pursued at the same time, and no need to chose between them. In fact, some story lines will play off of each other, and it is recommended to pursue all love interests at the same time if you don't want to miss any of the content.

This game features no dead-ends, no sudden game-overs, an you will never find yourself locked out of a character's path because you somehow failed to pick a "right" choice or accidentally flirted with another character without realizing. Every choice that has permanent consequences for a relationship with a love interest is clearly marked, and you will never have to choose between two love interests.

The game has some additional built-in walk-through options for players who prefer having extra guardrails present, even if there are no "bad" choices by design.

Development

Book one of The Velan Reach will contain the story of the first leg of the epic journey to recover the location of humanity's home world. It will consist of up to six chapters. Chapter one is available upon release into early access, chapters two through six will be made available as episodic content during this period.

No generative AI

In spite of the game featuring aliens and robots, it is made exclusively by humans. No generative AI whatsoever is used in creating this game.

data.short_description: An adult steampunk Visual Novel where you take on the role of a scientist joining a mission of discovery and wonder. Travel to strange new worlds and get to know your traveling companions (quite intimately so in some cases).

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or M1+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or M1+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS/Ubuntu 20.04+
  • 處理器: Steamdeck or 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:

  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
